input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.11.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.11.4.1
            TITLE: scoring term definitions:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.11.4.1: Scoring Term Definitions:
D.11.4.1 Scoring Term Definitions: 
• Corrected Time = Autocross Run Time + ( DOO * 2 ) + ( OC * 20 ) 
• Tyour  -  the best Corrected Time for the team  
• Tmin  -  the lowest Corrected Time recorded for any team 
• Tmax  - 145% of Tmin

final_answer: rule D.11.4.1: Scoring Term Definitions: D.11.4.1 Scoring Term Definitions: • Corrected Time = Autocross Run Time + ( DOO * 2 ) + ( OC * 20 ) • Tyour - the best Corrected Time for the team • Tmin - the lowest Corrected Time recorded for any team • Tmax - 145% of Tmin
